label: Pipedrive
description: Sales-focused CRM for managing deals, contacts, and pipelines.

form.title: Connect Pipedrive
form.subtitle: Paste your Pipedrive API token and company subdomain to get started.

methods.label: Personal API Token
methods.description: Paste your Pipedrive personal API token and company subdomain. No OAuth setup required — the simplest and fastest path.
methods.how_to:
## Find your Pipedrive API Token

1. Log in to your Pipedrive account.
2. Click your **avatar** (top-right corner) → **Personal preferences**.
3. Navigate to the **API** tab.
4. Copy the token shown under **Your personal API token**. It is a 40-character hex string.
5. Paste it into the **API Token** field below.

## Find your Company Subdomain

1. Look at your browser's address bar when logged into Pipedrive — it reads `https://<your-company>.pipedrive.com`.
2. Copy just the subdomain part (e.g. `acme`) and paste it into the **Company Subdomain** field below.

## Notes

- The token grants full API access as your user. Keep it secret.
- If you suspect the token is compromised, regenerate it on the same **API** tab — Anton will prompt you to re-enter the new one.
- Read [Pipedrive's API token guide](https://pipedrive.readme.io/docs/how-to-find-the-api-token) for full details.

fields.name: api_token
fields.label: API Token
fields.description: 40-character personal API token from Pipedrive → Personal preferences → API tab.

fields.name: company_subdomain
fields.label: Company Subdomain
fields.description: The part before .pipedrive.com in your Pipedrive URL, e.g. 'acme' for acme.pipedrive.com.

methods.label: OAuth 2.0 (App credentials)
methods.description: Use a Pipedrive Marketplace app's client credentials to authorize via browser. Suitable for multi-user setups or when you need to avoid storing personal API tokens.
methods.how_to:
## Set up Pipedrive OAuth

You'll need to create a Pipedrive Marketplace app to get OAuth credentials.

1. Go to [Pipedrive Developer Hub](https://developers.pipedrive.com/) and sign in.
2. Click **Create an app** → give it a name like `Anton Integration`.
3. Under **OAuth & Access scopes**, add the scopes you need (deals, contacts, activities, pipelines, users).
4. Set the **Callback URL** to `http://localhost` (Anton uses a local redirect).
5. On the app's **Overview** page, copy the **Client ID** and **Client secret**.
6. Paste both into the fields below and click **Submit** — Anton will open a browser authorization window.

## Notes

- Access tokens expire after 1 hour; Anton uses the refresh token to renew automatically.
- Revoking the app from Pipedrive Marketplace settings will immediately invalidate the connection.

fields.name: client_id
fields.label: Client ID
fields.description: Found on your Pipedrive Marketplace app's Overview page.

fields.name: client_secret
fields.label: Client Secret
fields.description: Paired with the Client ID; found on the same Marketplace app Overview page.
